betterquesting:10.desc:8:
In the midst of all that is happening, this revelation feels quite pointless. And yet, if the Shyre Empire and the Twilight Horde had know of it, things would have played out in a very different way.
Most of the Dimensional Shards within Terra were hidden away, by the Meatball Man himself.
But now that this magic is under my control, that Gluttony is within my grasp, I can bring the Shards back.
